creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
I confirm this is fixed now. After commit https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-quarterly/commit/d0640fe1f32b50ae2eb6937884df612e1dc857cd we can now deal differently with addresses needing to be in CC and addresses that we can put in BCC, so we should not need any weird workaround anymore.

Thanks everyone for helping with the issue.
